message:
feat(server): Add strict_input_validation setting (bd-2js)

Implement strict input validation for tool parameters that rejects
extra properties not defined in the schema.

Changes:
- Add validate_strict() to schema.rs that recursively adds
  additionalProperties:false to object schemas
- Add strict_input_validation field/method to ServerBuilder
- Router uses strict or lenient validation based on config
- Add 9 tests for strict validation behavior

Behavior:
- Strict mode: Extra fields → InvalidParams error
- Lenient mode (default): Extra fields allowed

Closes bd-2js

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
